meaning: n.[化]乙酰苯,苯乙酮,苯基甲基甲酮
examples: A typical example is the oxidation of ethylbenzene to prepare acetophenone.
The yield of benzylidene acetophenone reached 31.4% under optimal conditions.
Asymmetric reduction of acetophenone derivatives preparing chiral aromatic alcohol has become a new focus of study.
